facilities.name: Hunter Ferrell Landfill Scalehouse and Administration Complex
facilities.address: 110 E Hunter Ferrell Rd, Irving, TX 75060
facilities.hours: Irving lists the landfill complex as open 7:00 AM to 5:30 PM Monday through Saturday. Confirm before visiting.
facilities.fees: Landfill and disposal fees vary by load type and residency status. Confirm current rates before arrival.
accepted_materials: Waste generated within the City of Irving
facilities.rules: Bring photo ID and proof of Irving residency, and use the official city page to confirm accepted loads before driving.
